requirements.task_name: Set up a $25+ monthly donation to the Youth Scholarship Fund starting next month
requirements.task_description: Create a recurring monthly donation to the 'Youth Scholarship Fund' with specific amount, start date, and fee coverage, and reach the on-site review page.

requirements.task_name: Register a 10-year-old for the earliest weekday evening audition next month at the Main Campus
requirements.task_description: Filter and select an audition slot at Main Campus in the next calendar month, weekday evening at or after 5:00 PM, and submit registration for a 10-year-old.

requirements.task_name: Submit a need-based tuition scholarship application for the 2025–2026 season
requirements.task_description: Submit an online scholarship application with need-based type, 2025–2026 season, current-member status, low income band, and non-empty explanation.

requirements.task_name: Purchase two mid-priced tickets for the December Holiday Concert in the same row
requirements.task_description: Find the December Holiday Concert, choose the mid-priced (< $50) tier (neither cheapest nor most expensive), select two adjacent seats in the same row, and proceed to the final on-site order summary page.

requirements.task_name: Sign up for a Saturday volunteer usher shift of at least 3 hours this month
requirements.task_description: Filter volunteer opportunities to event-support roles and register for a Saturday usher/front-of-house shift later this month lasting at least 3 hours, opting in to updates.

requirements.task_name: Choose a choir ensemble for a 13-year-old with rehearsals ending by 7:30 PM and tuition under $600, then start registration
requirements.task_description: Compare ensembles, find one that accepts 13-year-olds, rehearses on weekdays ending no later than 7:30 PM, costs under $600 per season, and start registration for that ensemble.

requirements.task_name: Subscribe to the email newsletter with specific interests and a monthly frequency
requirements.task_description: Use the on-site form to subscribe with a placeholder email, select "Upcoming Concerts" and "Scholarships & Financial Aid" interests (only), choose monthly frequency, and agree to terms.

requirements.task_name: Reserve a spot in a free adult community singing workshop downtown next month
requirements.task_description: Filter workshops to free adult offerings next month at the Downtown location and reserve one seat via the on-site registration.
